input.title: GPT-5 Released with Native Tool Orchestration
input.content: OpenAI has released GPT-5, introducing native multi-step tool orchestration. The model can autonomously chain API calls, write and execute code, and self-correct based on tool output. Context window expanded to 1M tokens.

input.title: dbt Core 2.0 Released — Breaking Changes to Ref() Behavior
input.content: dbt Labs has released dbt Core 2.0. The ref() function now enforces explicit schema versioning. Projects using cross-project refs must migrate to the new syntax. Migration guide included.

input.title: 10 Ways AI is Transforming Healthcare
input.content: AI is being used in hospitals for diagnostics, scheduling, and patient engagement. Several startups are building AI-powered tools for doctors.

input.title: Azure AI Foundry Now Supports Heterogeneous Agent Teams
input.content: Microsoft announced that Azure AI Foundry now supports mixing agents built with Semantic Kernel, LangChain, and raw REST APIs under a single orchestration plane.

input.title: New CSS Grid Feature in Chrome 125
input.content: Chrome 125 ships a new CSS subgrid feature that makes complex layouts easier to build.
